mapper.insert: INSERT INTO agent_ui.workflow_run ( id, workflow_type, status, user_id, conversation_id, input_message, result_json, error_message, created_at, updated_at, finished_at ) VALUES ( #{id}::uuid, #{workflowType}, #{status}, #{userId}, #{conversationId}, #{inputMessage}, #{resultJson}::jsonb, #{errorMessage}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt}, #{finishedAt} )
mapper.update: UPDATE agent_ui.workflow_run SET status = #{status}, updated_at = #{updatedAt}, finished_at = #{finishedAt}, error_message = #{errorMessage} WHERE id = #{id}::uuid
UPDATE agent_ui.workflow_run SET status = 'RUNNING', updated_at = #{updatedAt} WHERE id = #{id}::uuid AND status = 'PENDING'
UPDATE agent_ui.workflow_run SET status = #{status}, result_json = #{resultJson}::jsonb, updated_at = #{updatedAt}, finished_at = #{finishedAt}, error_message = NULL WHERE id = #{id}::uuid
mapper.select: SELECT r.id, r.workflow_type AS workflowType, r.status, r.user_id AS userId, r.conversation_id AS conversationId, r.input_message AS inputMessage, r.result_json::text AS resultJson, r.error_message AS errorMessage, r.created_at AS createdAt, r.updated_at AS updatedAt, r.finished_at AS finishedAt, (SELECT COUNT(*)::int FROM agent_ui.workflow_checkpoint c WHERE c.run_id = r.id) AS checkpointCount FROM agent_ui.workflow_run r WHERE r.id = #{id}::uuid
SELECT COUNT(*)::int FROM agent_ui.workflow_run WHERE id = #{id}::uuid AND user_id = #{userId}
